reviews.comment:
Me paso algo extraño cargue 1000$ y no lo vi reflejado en mi indicador..al principio.dps se normalizo creo que tiene mucha presion el surtidor..amplio lugar exelente para encuentros

(Translated by Google)
Something strange happened to me. I filled up with $1000 and it wasn't reflected on my meter at first. Then it went back to normal. I think the pump has too much pressure. Spacious place, excellent for meeting up.
